description: Stop Wasting Money on American Style Air Fryer Cookbooks! Are you looking for a REAL BRITISH COOKBOOK? If so, click the вАЬ Buy now вАЭ Button! It is no secret that most of the Air Fryer Cookbooks on the marketplace are just a mere copy and paste of american style recipes, you just have to read a couple of reviews to realise it. But the same can't be said about my book though! I have meticulously selected every recipe that is this book to offer you the best experience; there are no fancy ingredients recipes, or impossible things to cook, everything is functional and most of all delicious. Just to give you and idea, here some of what you will find: A breakfast hack for both children and adults, perfect for a busy day! How to prepare a delicious dessert in less than 10 minutes! A Cottage Pie recipe designed for the Air Fryer! Super crispy Fish and Chips that will take you less than 15 minutes! How to prepare a perfectly juicy steak using an Air Fryer! The secret recipes to make some gloriously puffed-up Yorkshire Puddings! How to make your vegetables taste as delicious as they have never been! And so much moreвА¶ DonвАЩt hesitate and let this opportunity slip away!! This book might be EXACTLY what you were looking for. Scroll Up and Click the вАЬBuy NowвАЭ Button! Read more
